init.description: Short interview, write PRODUCT.md + STRATEGY.md (north star + goals) under `~/.darin/workspaces/<id>/`

ingest.description: File something you learned into memory and note what it might mean; also helps plan customer calls

plan.description: Turn a problem or goal into a scoped brief: build now / next / skip

prioritize.description: Pick the right way to order competing work and apply it

review.description: Weekly sweep for stale evidence and drift from your goals
